calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-24-2019 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Nov-06-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rowena Navia for Ben Hara (Petitioner)

Ms. Navia stated that they listed all beneficiaries, that there are no known beneficary that are or never were incarcerated or require notice.

The First and Final Report of Executor on Waiver of Accounting, etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: T. Jackson. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-16-2019 Continued To Oct-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-21-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Rowena Navia for Ben and John Hara

Ms. Navia stated that this is a traditional Japanese family who opted to nominate both eldest brothers-in-law even though the sister may have been a better option since she lives in San Francisco. Ms. Navia also stated that John Hara is younger and lives in Southern California, Ben Hara is older and lives in Arizona, both understand the duties, she has discussed with her clients the option for one of them to resign, and neither wants to give up their position. The Court granted the petition for probate of will and for letters testamentary (subject to review of the order) to allow single signature but does not change equal duties and liabilities. Bond in the amount of $683,000.00 is required. Status on close of estate is set for December 24, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-05-2018 Continued To Jun-19-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
